meaning: Configured public Pages URLs must be verified after the canonical workflow deploys the latest main commit.
required_distinction: Committed content is not the same as externally verified public page state.
paths_note: Path is shown without leading dot for iOS readability. Actual workflow path uses the leading dot directory.
next_actions: Run the canonical workflow on main.
Confirm build-pages, deploy-pages, and verify-public-pages complete successfully.
Confirm the public page for the changed content is reachable after deployment.
Record the public URL and deployment ref after verification.
non_claims: This status file does not prove deployment failure.
This status file does not prove public visibility before the current workflow run completes.
This status file records the current unverified state from available status data.
